name: Weeping Woman
ability: Each night, learn who died tonight. You weep for them until dusk (you discover if they have an evil neighbor).

name: Lovebird
ability: Each night, choose a player. You are mad that you agree with them and must vote and nominate alongside them tomorrow, or you might be executed.

name: Butcher
ability: Each night, choose a player: if they are the Lovebird, or if a player broke a social constraint today, you are safe from the Demon tonight.

name: Vulture
ability: Immediately after dusk, you learn which character died by execution. You consume them and gain their power (if they are a Minion, you use it for the Good team).

name: Predator
ability: Each night, choose two players: if one is the Demon, the Demon does not wake tonight. If both are evil, a Minion dies.

name: Eskes
ability: You start knowing who the Demon is. Each night, choose a player to learn their character, but this info has a 50% chance to be false.

name: Barmaid
ability: Each night, choose up to two players: they are drunk until dusk.

name: Vixen
ability: You start knowing the Demon and 1 Minion. Each night, choose to stay Evil or permanently become Good and betray the Demon. If you betray, you must execute the Demon tomorrow, or you die tonight.

name: Lynx
ability: Each night*, choose to kill up to 2 players. If you choose 0, you are Invisible tomorrow: you register as a Townsfolk, and if executed, you die as them, the game continues, and a remaining Minion (except Vixen) becomes Lynx.

name: SinO'dess
ability: Each night, choose 2 players and one Sin to apply to both until dusk: they are poisoned, they swap characters, or they die. (Max 1 permanent character swap per game).
